---
title: "data_analysis_products"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| mesage: false

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)   # clean_names(), tabyl()
library(skimr)     # skim() for fast EDA
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| message: false

enabled <- read_csv(
  "data/enabled.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()


```

```{r}
#| label: sanity-check

glimpse(enabled)
dim(enabled)

# show column names (useful for writing later code)
names(enabled)
```

```{r}
#| label: write-csv

write_csv(enabled, "data/enabled.csv")

```
